name: plan-item-guidance-v2
prediction: The legacy "5-10 ordered items" line is an unenforced numeric bound (plan_write's schema has no maxItems, only minItems:1) that the model already routinely ignores. Replacing it with non-numeric, need-sized guidance (still anti-padding, anti-fake-split) should be pass-rate neutral while letting item counts track real task granularity instead of clustering at the 5-10 boundary.
